title: Physematium neomexicanum
taxonomy: Physematium neomexicanum is classified as a genus of orchids within the family Orchidaceae. The species is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae and tribe Vanilleae. Physematium neomexicanum is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The classification of Physematium neomexicanum reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family. Further research may be necessary to confirm the most up-to-date classification of this species.
